svg.title: Internal prerequisite structure of the two-year core
svg.desc: The eight blocks of the core with hard prerequisite arrows between courses. Block 1 courses CS-101, CS-102, CS-103 are the highest-risk load-bearing walls, each blocking many downstream courses. Year-2 courses block little or nothing.
svg.text: Number on a course = how many later courses it blocks if failed
Math (blue) and stats (blue) run as self-contained linear chains down the right; CS spine cascades from Block 1.
